use_cases: Creating glowing spotlight highlights on hero sections and cards to draw attention to key elements
Adding depth and visual hierarchy to marketing and landing pages with animated blur effects
Enhancing interactive elements like buttons and CTAs with a premium luminous overlay
Building interactive card components that respond to cursor movement with spotlight effects
Adding decorative visual polish to SaaS product interfaces and dashboards
ai_summary: A lightweight SVG spotlight overlay component that creates a glowing, blur-based effect using Gaussian blur filters and semi-transparent ellipses. Designed as a reusable decorative effect to be positioned absolutely over other UI elements, commonly used with hover animations to create cursor-following or scroll-triggered spotlight reveals in modern UI designs.
